markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align content strategy with Otto's 2026 business priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Persona:** Add "Travel Managers" as a secondary persona to support the Direct Travel TMC partnership. This content will focus on validation, not direct conversion, to build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** Prioritize refreshing existing content to align with the new TMC partnership and integrate upcoming features like price protection.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Deeper Product Content:** Create more detailed, feature-focused content with screenshots and video to better demonstrate Otto's value.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [**New CTA Strategy:** Test reusable, visual CTAs (e.g., sticky right-column widgets) to increase product engagement and track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Business Priorities

  - [**Pilot Program:** A 20-person pilot is launching with four companies (10–3,000 travelers) to test new features.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Product Roadmap:** Upcoming features create new content opportunities:](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Price Protection:** Automatically rebooks flights/hotels at lower prices.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Delegate Access:** Enables EAs to manage travel for multiple executives.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Teams/Slack Agents:** Allows direct interaction with Otto via chat apps.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### New Persona: Travel Managers

  - [**Goal:** Support the Direct Travel TMC partnership by targeting Travel Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This content provides validation for TMC account managers presenting Otto to their clients.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Why:** Prospects research Otto post-pitch (via Google, ChatGPT), and existing content builds trust and confirms Otto is a "real thing."](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Educate on TMC-specific pain points and Otto's value, using their language.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Key Metrics:** Cost savings (e.g., $70 call-in vs. $20 online transaction) and time savings.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**CTA:** A "get in touch" form, not a self-serve signup, to capture qualified leads for the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Primary Goal:** Drive organic and assisted traffic leading to user signups and transactions.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Traffic is trending up.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [The "travel disruption and optimization" pillar performs well, aligning with core value prop.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
      - [Comparison/list articles are highly cited by AI search, boosting visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Content feels repetitive; new features offer a chance to create fresh, exciting topics.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### New Content Formats & CTAs

  - [**Deeper Product Demos:** Create content showing "how Otto works" with screenshots and video.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Why:** Better demonstrates value and moves beyond high-level mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Framing:** Connect features directly to solving user pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Reusable CTAs:** Test reusable, visual CTAs (e.g., sticky right-column widgets).](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
      - [**Why:** Low-effort way to increase product engagement and track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
      - [**Test:** Start with 3 CTAs to measure their effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Send January report and check site indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Research Travel Manager persona and keywords to propose a new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Prioritize content refresh, starting with TMC-related posts and top-ranking articles.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Send Loom demo of the new AI visibility tool; provide client login access next week.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Otto:**](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Share the 5-slide deck for the Direct Travel partnership to inform content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Provide the product roadmap for upcoming features (e.g., price protection).](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Implement and test 3 reusable CTAs to measure engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/tUf33mP35_hJytxuSotzuJLyNVaJzP7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
